description_long: This object is a classic American-style hot dog, featuring a plump sausage nestled inside a soft, split-top bun. The sausage is topped with a generous zigzag of bright yellow mustard and a parallel line of vivid red ketchup, both applied along the length of the sausage. The bun appears lightly browned on the outside, with a smooth, slightly matte finish, and is shaped to cradle the sausage securely. The sausage itself is a rich reddish-brown, with a glossy surface that suggests a juicy, cooked interior. No grill marks are visible on either the sausage or the bun, and there is no visible packaging or tray. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of a street food hot dog found in urban parks or at food stands.
description: A plump sausage in a soft, split-top bun, topped with zigzags of mustard and ketchup. The hot dog is unwrapped and visually appetizing, with no grill marks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the sausage, bun, and both mustard and ketchup lines clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bun's rounded base and the condiments running along the top of the sausage.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the sausage end and the condiments' application from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the bun's smooth, rounded base and the condiments on top.
